title: Create : To the creativity!
description: it adds all the create/create addons that are currently available to get for the full expirience for your creativity to go on the next level!
body:
# About The Modpack
This modpack enhances the Create-ivity (get it?), of one of the most popular mod on modrinth called [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and adds other addons to make your expirience better on ease
# The modlist 

The mod list includes..

<details>
<summary>Mod list</summary>

- Create
- Valkyrien Skies
- FramedBlocks
- Farmer's Delight
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies
- Create: Structures
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: Interactive
- Create: Framed
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create Jetpack
- Create Goggles
- Create Enchantment Industry
- Create Deco
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Big Cannons
- Architectury API
- and finally, Kotlin for Forge

</details>



# Instructions on how to install the modpack
To install the modpack,
you will need
- The modrinth app,
- An OS,
- And the instructions,
And with that said..

## Step 1:
Open the modrinth app,

## Step 2:
Go to the modpacks section,

## Step 3:
Search up "Create: To the creativity!
and lastly,

## Step 4:
Click on "install"!

And its that easy!
And also
> For instructions with other launchers, please see [the instructions](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/)!
# All credit goes to the awesome mod creators!
